temporal_description: The audio consists solely of a gentle and melancholic instrumental piece. A lone harmonica plays a slow, wistful melody, creating a somber and reflective atmosphere. The music is calm and contemplative, evoking a sense of quiet introspection or nostalgia. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects present. The video opens with a high-angle, slightly shaky shot looking down a narrow, dimly lit alleyway at night. In the center of the frame, a man with short, light-colored hair, wearing a dark suit jacket, is seen from behind as he walks away from the camera. The alley is cluttered, with what appear to be plastic bags hanging on either side. In the background, a car is partially visible, and a poster with some text and an image is affixed to a wall on the left. The overall lighting is cool and moody, with a greenish-blue tint. In the top right corner of the screen, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains stationary, observing the man as he moves deeper into the dark passage. The scene then cuts to an interior shot of a warmly lit room. Two women are standing close together, smiling and laughing. The woman on the left has long, dark hair and is wearing a red and black patterned top. The woman on the right, with her back more to the camera, has her hair styled up and is wearing a floral-patterned top. They appear to be sharing a happy, intimate moment. The background is softly blurred, showing a warm, domestic interior with what looks like a curtain or wall paneling. The camera is steady, focusing on the joyful interaction between the two women.
